nasb.text: However, an earthenware vessel which the person with the discharge touches shall be broken, and every wooden vessel shall be rinsed in water.

esv.text: And an earthenware vessel that the one with the discharge touches shall be broken, and every vessel of wood shall be rinsed in water.

cnv.text: 有異常排泄的人摸過的瓦器，必須打碎；他摸過的任何木器，都要用水洗淨。

ccb.text: 必须打碎他摸过的陶器，用水清洗他摸过的木器。
